description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage. Define a hidden job template .deploy that sets the variables STACK to gis and STATUS_CHECK_DELAY to 360. Include the external template file /deployment-service/docker-deploy.yml from the redmic-project/gitlab-ci-templates repository at the master ref, which provides the actual deployment jobs that run in the deploy stage and inherit the .deploy variables. Ensure the pipeline uses only the deploy stage and the included jobs will execute accordingly.
